message:
chore(beads): close 73nj9, pd47f, kmup7 — verified green across 3 stability rounds

All three beads filed from pane3's 3e3qg.6 triage run are no longer
reproducing after concurrent agent commits landed (notably e9ee8762
72sq9.3 expose queue and byte-budget headroom which repaired the
LexicalRebuildPipelineRuntimeSnapshot serde surface). Verified
2026-04-23 14:39 UTC across 3 consecutive runs with 5+ peer cargo
panes active. No source changes; pure triage-close with
verification.

- 73nj9 [HIGH] state_meta_json_reports_active_rebuild_pipeline_runtime
- pd47f [MEDIUM] status_json + health_json exit 512
- kmup7 [MEDIUM/flaky] parallel_insert_conversation_tree retry budget

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
